prestazioni: Replacement of the stock TFG (Twin-Fluidic-Generator) hybrid system with a Koenigsegg-developed 'TFG 2.0' unit, featuring a 5.0L V8 (internal code: KDD-50) with reinforced Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (95mm bore, 10.8:1 CR) and upgraded titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems), paired with a Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (1.45 A/R, 106mm compressor wheel) and a custom 4.5L air-to-water intercooler (Setrab Pro Line) for sustained 1,800+ hp on E85 fuel

Installation of a Koenigsegg-specific 'Direct Drive' torque-vectoring differential (DDD) with a carbon-fiber driveshaft (Hexcel IM7) and a 9-speed multi-clutch transaxle (Koenigsegg Light Speed Transmission - LST) recalibrated via a Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke 'Track Attack' map, reducing 0-60 mph to 1.8s via pre-programmed launch control and torque biasing to the rear wheels (80/20 split under 100 mph)

Upgraded braking system featuring AP Racing CP9760-1000 carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 395mm rear) with titanium pistons, paired with Ferodo DS3000 brake pads and a Koenigsegg-developed 'Brake-by-Wire' ABS system (Bosch Motorsport MS 5.1) with 12-stage adjustability, reducing 124-0 mph braking distance to 180 feet
estetica: Full carbon-fiber 'Aero Package' bodywork replacement with Koenigsegg's 'Ghost' weave (pre-preg autoclave, 3K twill), including a revised front splitter with active Gurney flaps (electrically adjustable via the infotainment system) and a rear diffuser with integrated vortex generators (tested in Sauber F1 wind tunnel, reducing drag by 12% at 250 mph)

Custom 'Triplex' suspension arms (visible through the front fenders) fabricated from aerospace-grade 7075-T6 aluminum with anodized gold accents, paired with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 200mm travel) and a Koenigsegg-developed 'Dynamic Ride Height' system (hydraulic actuators, lowering the car by 30mm at 100 mph for reduced drag)

Exterior lighting upgrade to Koenigsegg's 'Lux' LED system, featuring adaptive matrix headlights (Osram SSL 150, 1,500 lumens) with laser high-beams (ZKW Group, 600m range) and a rear light bar with sequential turn signals (Philips Lumileds, 300% brighter than stock), all controlled via a CAN bus interface for real-time adjustment
